mapper.insert: insert into advisor_product_subscription (product_id, user_id, status) values (#{productId}, #{userId}, #{status})
mapper.update: update advisor_product_subscription set status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select s.id as subscriptionId, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, s.status as status, nav.nav as latestNav, nav.cum_return as latestCumReturn, s.created_at as subscribedAt from advisor_product_subscription s inner join advisor_product p on p.id = s.product_id left join ( select n1.product_id, n1.nav, n1.cum_return from advisor_product_nav n1 inner join ( select product_id, max(nav_date) as max_nav_date from advisor_product_nav group by product_id ) latest on latest.product_id = n1.product_id and latest.max_nav_date = n1.nav_date ) nav on nav.product_id = p.id where s.user_id = #{userId} and s.status = 'ACTIVE' and p.status = 'PUBLISHED' order by s.created_at desc, s.id desc
